summary: First testing iteration of Jarvis web preview. All 6 backend pytest cases passed (root status, new session, SSE chat streaming with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations, history GET/DELETE, unknown session). Frontend UI verified end-to-end: Jarvis window centered, all data-testid elements visible, chat streaming works (assistant response 'Online, sharp, and ready. Go.' to 'reply in 5 words' confirms JARVIS personality & SSE delta parsing), transcript panel toggle works, settings modal opens via both settings-btn and get-mac-app-btn CTA, voice/close/clear buttons functional, Enter-key sends messages, mic button present (disabled in headless as expected — no crash). Electron desktop source exists at /app/jarvis-desktop (electron/main.js, renderer/App.jsx, package.json, README.md).
critical_code_review_comments: Tool log displays hardcoded 'claude-sonnet-4-5 online' in App.js line 41, while backend uses model id 'claude-sonnet-4-6' (chat/stream default). Cosmetic only — both refer to the same Claude Sonnet 4.5 family — but worth aligning the string.

Frontend stores session_id in localStorage but never calls /api/session/new — UUID generated client-side with crypto.randomUUID(). The backend /api/session/new endpoint is therefore unused by the web UI (still works, just dead code in this flow).
handleSend useCallback dependency list excludes 'input' updates via setInput('') before await — harmless but flagged by eslint-disable comment. Acceptable.
Backend chat_stream writes message before model call; if LLM call fails the user message is orphaned without an assistant reply. Consider a status field or compensating write on error.
No rate limiting / auth on /api/chat/stream — fine for preview but worth noting for production.
test_credentials: Not applicable - public app, no auth
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own session_id (uuid) and cleans up via DELETE /api/chat/history/{session_id}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_jarvis_backend.py covers all 5 endpoints. Frontend uses custom SSE parser (fetch + getReader) — verified working with real Claude streaming. Electron desktop app source-only in /app/jarvis-desktop — DO NOT attempt to run in container.
